summary: Filtered mark_scheme_text foreign-label detection against known question numbers for each paper.

files_changed.why: Built known question-number sets by paper and ignored label-like lines absent from the current paper.
Extended the text-label fixture with known q7/q9 records and an unknown 90 (x) false-positive control.

test_results: Initial extended fixture failed as expected because 90 was reported as a foreign label.
Live audit still exits 1, but mark_scheme_text_foreign_question_label_record_count dropped from 25 to 22.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated output was modified by this iteration.
The live audit report was written under the run folder.
known_risks: If a question bank is missing records for a paper, the known-number filter can suppress a true foreign label for the absent question.
